output [count {4,5,6} in 2d6] named "2d6 normal"
output [count {5,6} in 2d6] named "2d6 -1 normal"

output [count {112,121,124,142,161,162,162,164,211,214,221,241,261,262,261,412,421,461,462,464}in d{1,2,2,4,4,4} + d{10,20,20,40,60,60}+ d{100,200,200,400,400,400}]named "1d6 +2dcombo "

output [count {1112,1122,1122,1124,1211,1221,1221,1222,1224,1241,1242,1244,1261,1261,1262,1262,1264,1264,1412,1442,1461,1462,1462,1464,1611,1612,1612,1614,1621,1621,1622,1622,1624,1624,1641,1542,1642,1644,1661,1661,1662,1662,1662,1664,1664,2111,2112,2112,2114,2121,2121,2122,2124,2141,2142,2144,2161,2161,2162,2162,2164,2164,2261,2261,2262,2264,2461,2461,2462,2464,2661,2661,2661,2662,2662,2664,2664,4112,4121,4161,4162,4162,4164,4211,4212,4214,4221,4241,4261,4261,4262,4264,4412,4421,4461,4462,4464,4611,4612,4612,4641,4642,4644,4661,4662,4664} in d{1000,2000,2000,4000,4000,4000} + d{100,200,200,400,600,600} + d{1,2,2,4,4,4} + d{10,20,20,40,60,60}]  named "2d+2d  2hit +1combo"
